candidates.why: Direct operating revenue line with populated values; best match for top-line sales/revenue.
Also a top-line revenue total and appears equal to reported revenue across years; suitable fallback label if needed.

variables.notes: Used a priority list of revenue labels rather than summing.

candidates.why: Primary direct cost line directly beneath revenue; best match for cost of sales/COGS.
Equivalent total cost-of-revenues line with same values; useful fallback if label changes by year.

variables.notes: Chose direct cost-of-revenue labels as priority options; later code should take first non-missing value rather than sum.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A row, populated, and already excludes R&D; preferred over broader operating expense buckets.
Alternative SG&A label but less preferred because the explicit excluding-R&D row is more semantically precise.
Too broad and includes COGS, so not preferred when explicit SG&A exists.

final_choice.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A row exists and is populated, so selected only that row per hierarchy. Excluded depreciation/amortization component rows and broader operating expense totals.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: This is not an R&D expense line; it indicates SG&A excluding R&D and therefore does not itself capture XRD.

variables.notes: No dedicated research/development expense row is present in the provided statements. The selected SG&A row explicitly excludes R&D, but no separate R&D line can be identified, so XRD is set to empty.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Most specific recurring interest-expense line; preferred over broader finance cost totals and duplicate generic interest labels.
Also a valid interest expense label with matching values in preview; suitable fallback if needed.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supple
candidates.why: Recurring financing cost but likely already included in the main interest expense line, so adding it would risk double counting.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Selected the most granular main interest-expense row and avoided combining with lease-interest supplemental data to prevent double counting.

candidates.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
candidates.why: Best book equity measure because it explicitly excludes minority interest and is attributable to parent shareholders.
Appears to represent common equity attributable to shareholders and matches parent equity values; useful fallback label.

candidates.row_label: Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders
candidates.why: Also conceptually appropriate, but appears less consistently populated in the preview.

final_choice.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders

variables.notes: Used parent-attributable equity labels only, excluding total equity including minority interest to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet non-controlling interest line; best match for MIB.
Alternative minority interest label with matching values; suitable fallback if needed.

variables.notes: Used minority-interest balance sheet labels as a priority list; BE was chosen excluding minority interest.
